proven.claim: Documentation completeness: the number of commands printed in the
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 539
; Documentation completeness: the number of commands printed in the
; "Commands:" section must equal the number of cases in main's switch.
(declare-const switch_cases Int)
(declare-const documented_commands Int)
; Code transition: main switch has 9 named cases:
;   init, analyze, verify, derive, diff, explain, report, hook, override
(assert (= switch_cases 9))
; Code transition: printHelp lines 540-548 document exactly 9 commands:
;   init, analyze, derive, verify, diff, explain, report, hook, override
(assert (= documented_commands 9))
; Negation: counts differ (undocumented or phantom command exists)
(assert (not (= switch_cases documented_commands)))
(check-sat)
